intro: Marta asks Preben what he got up to yesterday. He walks her through the whole day in the past tense - see if you can follow it.

messages.speaker: marta
messages.en: Hi Preben! What did you do yesterday?

messages.speaker: preben
messages.es: Ayer por la mañana fui al gimnasio.
messages.en: Yesterday morning I went to the gym.

messages.speaker: preben
messages.es: Fue bien, pero un poco aburrido.
messages.en: It was fine, but a bit boring.

messages.speaker: preben
messages.es: Después comí en casa y vi el Mundial.
messages.en: After that I ate at home and watched the World Cup.

messages.speaker: marta
messages.en: Where did you watch the World Cup?

messages.speaker: marta
messages.es: Qué bien! Y por la tarde?
messages.en: How nice! And in the afternoon?

messages.speaker: preben
messages.es: Por la tarde caminé al faro y hice fotos.
messages.en: In the afternoon I walked to the lighthouse and took photos.

messages.speaker: preben
messages.es: Sí, hizo calor todo el día.
messages.en: Yes, it was hot all day.

messages.speaker: preben
messages.es: Anoche me quedé en casa. Estuve cansado.
messages.en: Last night I stayed home. I was tired.

questions.prompt: What did Preben do yesterday morning?

questions.quote: Anoche me quedé en casa. Estuve cansado.

questions.prompt: Where did Preben watch the World Cup?

items: He ate and watched the World Cup
He stayed home in the evening
